case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. KUNZ, WILLIAM T.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNZ, WILLIAM T. $2,824.13 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,907.13
